programme.title: Nature
programme.sub-title: Becoming Elephant: The Orphans of Reteti: Graduation Day
programme.desc: Following the journey of orphaned elephants at Reteti, the first community-owned elephant sanctuary in Africa.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NOVA
programme.desc: Four members of the Artemis II crew embark on a perilous 10-day journey to orbit the moon.

programme.title: Secrets of the Dead
programme.desc: The search for the lost remains of formerly enslaved Black Union soldiers who were murdered after the Civil War.

programme.title: PBS News Hour
programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: This daily news program, produced by Japanese public broadcaster NHK, focuses on headlines and current events in Japan and other Asian countries. English-speaking presenters also cover other areas of interest, including business news, science and technology trends, sports highlights, and global weather forecasts.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: Presenting a round-up of the most recent news and developments from across the world.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: BBC World News America
programme.desc: The hosts shed light on political, economic and social issues in the United States and other notable events across the globe.

programme.title: France 24
programme.desc: Live feed from leading 24/7 international news and current affairs channel based in Paris, providing key information to understand ever-more complex global events through in-depth analysis and an international lens.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: A reunited Berlin entertains more visitors than ever before.

programme.title: California's Gold
programme.desc: Visiting places and events of interest in California.

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A secretary plummets to her death at the London headquarters of a multinational company; in Hastings, a member of the Home Guard is killed; Foyle and Milner discover how these deaths are linked.

programme.title: The Puzzle Lady
programme.desc: Sherry becomes concerned when her ex-husband, rock star Dennis Pride, comes to Bakerbury.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Foyle's War
programme.desc: A secretary plummets to her death at the London headquarters of a multinational company; in Hastings, a member of the Home Guard is killed; Foyle and Milner discover how these deaths are linked.

programme.desc: Sherry becomes concerned when her ex-husband, rock star Dennis Pride, comes to Bakerbury.

programme.title: Classic Arts Showcase
programme.desc: Promotes fine arts.

programme.title: Medical Stories
programme.desc: A woman's unexplained gastrointestinal pain leads to a diagnosis of exocrine pancreatic insufficiency (EPI), a condition in which the pancreas doesn't produce enough enzymes to help the body properly digest food.

programme.title: Medical Frontiers
programme.desc: Prevention to cure, the groundbreaking world of Japanese medical technology and healthcare, from food and exercise to the latest treatments.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: We introduce the renewed NEWSROOM TOKYO featuring its team of new anchors and highlighting its appeal through a special Expo-focused episode.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: This daily news program, produced by Japanese public broadcaster NHK, focuses on headlines and current events in Japan and other Asian countries. English-speaking presenters also cover other areas of interest, including business news, science and technology trends, sports highlights, and global weather forecasts.

programme.title: Democracy Now!
programme.desc: An independent news program features international journalists, grassroots leaders, independent analysts, as well as ordinary people directly affected by world events and U.S. policy.

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.desc: Siena, Italy's, Palio horse race; Scottish Highland Games; Carnevale in Venice, Italy; celebrating Easter in Greece.

programme.title: Ask This Old House
programme.desc: Mauro paints a baby's nursery using zero VOC paint; Richard tests out a new dryer that uses a heat pump to dry the clothes; Tom and Kevin build a record player stand out of oak plywood.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía

programme.title: Yan Can Cook: Spice Kingdom
programme.desc: The world's largest bean paste factory and the world's biggest chili market; chili banquet.

programme.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
programme.desc: Hummus fatteh with earthy, nutty flavors; green shakshuka including leeks, spinach and peas; chicken shawarma.

programme.title: Cook's Country
programme.desc: Garlic fried chicken; budget-friendly Dutch ovens; crispy Parmesan potatoes.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.desc: Mustardy apple butter-glazed pork chops; a white chocolate chip tasting; reviewing grill spatulas; the secrets to browned butter blondies.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: Tiffany Studios lily sconces circa 1905; a 1904 Philadelphia quilt; a Chinese and Japanese decorative art collection.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A 1929 New York Yankees partial team-signed ball; a New Mexico mining league trophy and photos; a Plains Indian child's beaded shirt.

programme.title: Giants Rising
programme.desc: Exploring the secrets of America's redwood forests, the tallest and some of the oldest living beings on Earth.

programme.desc: Co-anchors Amna Nawaz and Geoff Bennett and correspondents offer in-depth analysis of current events.

programme.title: BBC News
programme.desc: Twenty-four hours a day, the latest national and international stories as they break.

programme.title: Rick Steves' Europe
programme.sub-title: Germany's Hamburg and the Luther Trail
programme.desc: Germany's port city of Hamburg, post-World War II; historic sites of Martin Luther and the Reformation, including Erfurt, Wittenberg and Wartburg Castle; Wurzburg in Franconia.

programme.title: California's Gold with Huell Howser
programme.desc: Manzanar War Relocation Center was one of ten camps at which Japanese American citizens and resident Japanese aliens were interned during World War II. It is located at the foot of the imposing Sierra Nevadas in the Owens Valley.

programme.title: California's Gold
programme.desc: Harvest participants use vintage farming equipment and techniques.

programme.title: Eight Men Out
programme.desc: The Chicago White Sox, who are set to play the Cincinnati Reds in the World Series of 1919, are at odds with their team's owner, Charles Comiskey, who pays his players unsatisfactory wages despite the team's popularity. A group of professional gamblers offers the Sox's best athletes a fortune to throw the series, and the players agree. However, their reputations and careers are ruined when the dark secret, dubbed the Black Sox Scandal, reaches the public consciousness.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: The Greatest Story Ever Told
programme.desc: From his birth in Bethlehem to his death and eventual resurrection, the life of Jesus Christ (Max von Sydow) is given the all-star treatment in this epic retelling. Major aspects of Christ's life are touched upon, including the execution of all the newborn males in Egypt by King Herod (Claude Rains) ; Christ's baptism by John the Baptist (Charlton Heston) ; and the betrayal by Judas after the Last Supper that eventually leads to Christ's crucifixion and miraculous return.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Amanpour and Company
programme.desc: Christiane Amanpour leads discussions about world issues and interviews with global leaders.

programme.title: Classic Arts Showcase
programme.desc: Promotes fine arts.

programme.title: Trails to Oishii Tokyo
programme.desc: Japanese food available at Tokyo's iconic market, from seafood to produce.

programme.title: Asia Insight
programme.desc: This 30-minute international newscast produced by Japan's national public broadcaster NHK looks at the realities of Asia today. From the diminishing natural coral along the coast of Boracay to the recruitment efforts by The Republic of Korea to find foreign workers to offset its labor shortage and aging population, the documentary series offers in-depth, behind-the-scenes analysis of news and public affairs issues affecting the continent. The series presents Asia as an evolving region open to change but one that is also home to traditional cultures.

programme.title: Yoga in Practice
programme.desc: A basic backbend; Bridge Pose; opening the shoulders and chest.

programme.title: Classical Stretch: By Essentrics
programme.desc: A full-body standing and floor workout stretches and strengthens all muscles and tones the lower body.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: The Autograph Collection; the Rope Collection
programme.desc: When Nico teases Carl about bikes being for babies, he sets out to prove Nico wrong; Carl and his Fuzzytown friends can't wait to build a tree fort, but Carl has a hard time working as a team.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe, Jay and Lupe practice their fire safety plan when the fire inspector visits; Phoebe and Jay buy juice from Mr. Aguilar.

programme.title: SciGirls
programme.desc: Reagan, Kyra and Jayden visit Congress National Park in South Carolina to learn about its unique fireflies that flash in sync.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.sub-title: The Treeborhood Harvest Day; The Treeborhood Thankfulness Stew
programme.desc: The Wombats try to save Harvest Day as it becomes overrun by fog; Zeke tries to create stew that meets Mr. E's high standards.

programme.title: Cyberchase
programme.sub-title: The Creech Who Would Be Crowned
programme.desc: Cybersquad helps a girl beat Hacker in a race to rule Tikiville and, in the process, learns about distance and direction.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Biz Kid$
programme.desc: Ethics in business; the downside of not following ethical business practices.

programme.title: Joy of Painting With Nicholas Hankins: Bob Ross' Unfinished Season
programme.desc: Painting a northwest forest with rays of light pouring through the pine boughs.

programme.title: America's Test Kitchen
programme.sub-title: Maple Pork Chops and Squash Soup
programme.desc: Maple pork chops with sweet potato-bacon hash; reviewing enameled cast iron skillets; how to defrost food quickly; leek, fennel and squash soup with sausage.

programme.title: Christopher Kimball's Milk Street Television
programme.desc: Easy-stretch yogurt pizza dough; arrabbiata slab pizza; tarte flambee; how to turn a kitchen into a pizzeria.

programme.title: Pati's Mexican Table
programme.desc: El Volador; the art behind the Day of the Dead parades and festivals; alambre; papel picado artist Yurira Alfaro discusses the history of punctured paper; fish tamales.
